svg.text: GitHub PR Anomaly Detection with PyTorch Autoencoder

g.text: — All secrets fetched at runtime (VAULT_ADDR, VAULT_ROLE, VAULT_SECRET_PATH). No .env files.
Single-build artifact: same container image promoted from staging to production. No rebuilds.
Promotion = git merge (staging branch into main), not a separate deployment or image rebuild.
Vault for all secrets. Containers receive VAULT_ADDR + VAULT_ROLE + VAULT_SECRET_PATH only.
Blue/Green deployment with load-test gate: no production traffic until preview passes Locust tests.
